title: Translate should keep project terminology stable
why_this_case_exists: This checks the most important steady-state translation behavior: source changed a little, but the preferred term from memory should stay stable.
setup: The repository is a Git repo.
The source file exists in HEAD and is modified in the working tree.
The current English memory already prefers Wiki over Knowledge Base.

input.after_source_block: 使用知识库统一管理团队文档。
input.current_target_block: Use the Wiki to manage docs.

expected: Only the changed target block is regenerated.
The updated translation still uses Wiki.
Unchanged surrounding blocks stay unchanged or effectively unchanged.
should_not_happen: The term drifts back to Knowledge Base.
The model adds explanatory meaning that does not exist in the source.
